# Indiana Consumer Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Indiana
Region: US-IN
Citation: Indiana Consumer Data Protection Act
Authority: Indiana General Assembly
Source URL: https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2023/bills/senate/5/details
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, automated_decision_making, accountability
Keywords: Indiana Consumer Data Protection Act, consumer rights, sensitive data

## Summary
Indiana privacy law with controller and processor duties, consumer rights, sensitive-data consent, opt-outs, and assessments.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide privacy notice and appeal process.
- Execute processor contracts.
- Conduct assessments for high-risk processing.
